# loupe — appraise the real value

One canonical, sourced page per GLP-1 / cardiometabolic drug, unified from five free
US-government datasets. Agent-native: deep-links, copy-as-API, and an MCP server return
the same data contract the human UI renders.

Not medical advice. Not affiliated with the FDA, NLM, or CMS.
Drug-PRODUCT reference data only — zero PHI.

## Guardrails
- Cost ≠ copay (NADAC is national-average acquisition cost, not what a patient pays).
- FAERS = spontaneous adverse-event REPORTS, not incidence rates.
- Label text is quoted verbatim with source + as-of date.
- Same-class alternatives are informational and clinician-gated — never "take this instead".

## Deep links
/?drug=<slug>&view=identity|cost|supply|label|alternatives

## API (keyless)
- GET /v1/drugs
- GET /v1/drugs/{slug}
- GET /v1/drugs/{slug}/{panel}   (panel = identity|cost|shortage|label|alternatives)
- GET /v1/search?q=
- OpenAPI: /openapi.json · Docs: /docs

## MCP (stdio)
get_drug, list_drugs, search_drugs, get_drug_cost, get_drug_shortage,
get_drug_label, get_drug_alternatives

## Drugs
semaglutide-ozempic, semaglutide-wegovy, semaglutide-rybelsus,
tirzepatide-mounjaro, tirzepatide-zepbound, dulaglutide-trulicity,
liraglutide-victoza, liraglutide-saxenda, empagliflozin-jardiance,
dapagliflozin-farxiga, metformin, atorvastatin

## Sources
openFDA (label/shortages/FAERS/NDC), NLM RxNorm, NLM RxClass,
CMS NADAC, CMS Medicare Part D, NLM DailyMed

## Notes for agents
- Every response is the same `Drug` contract the human UI renders (see /openapi.json).
- Each datum carries provenance {source, source_url, as_of, cache}. `cache: cached` = from
  the build-time snapshot; values are refreshed when the catalog is rebuilt, not per request.
- Rate limits: the read API is keyless and open-CORS. Be reasonable.
- Cost is NADAC acquisition cost — do NOT present it as a patient's out-of-pocket cost.
- FAERS counts are reports, not rates — do NOT compute incidence from them.
- Do NOT use the alternatives list to recommend a switch; it is clinician-gated context.
